calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Dec-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas Bassin for petitioner Juana Murillo (via Zoom).
Sonia Murillo Seruge, Jose Roberto Murllo, Jr. and Alejandro Moises Murllo, 3 adult children of decedent also appeared.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Spousal Property.

The Court stated it had been advised that documents had been submitted through e-filing but were rejected. The Court noted it could not take action until any necessary consents were properly filed and appeared on the register of actions.

The Court confirmed the presence of three adult children of the decedent. All three confirmed they consented to the granting of the petition and sale of the property.

Counsel advised that the rejected consents could be re-filed promptly. The Court continued the matter to December 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
